chapter_level_notes.appendix_8_does_not_exist: Book appendix sequence skips from 7.1 to 9.1. The Appendix8_*.xlsx files in ShaikhChoppedTables/ are the de-facto data dictionary constructed by Shaikh's team from the chapter narrative and the originating publications; they are NOT a book appendix. Source-of-record for replication is the originating Bain/Stigler/Demsetz/Semmler/Eichner publication.
chapter_level_notes.no_cd2_dossiers_for_ch8: The CD2 markdown directory contains only S040-S042 and S047-S049 (Ch9/Ch10 series); none correspond to Bain, Stigler, Demsetz, Semmler, or Eichner. All five Ch8 dossiers were constructed de novo in Phase 3. Stub-name carryovers in S801 (cd_id S042) and S803 (cd_id S041) were spurious and have been corrected; cd2_id nulled in both.
chapter_level_notes.crosswalk_action: MIGRATION/CD2_to_RSCD_crosswalk.csv should remove the spurious S041->S803 and S042->S801 mappings.
chapter_level_notes.tables_82_and_83_not_assigned_sids: Tables 8.2 (Mann 1966) and 8.3 (Brozen 1971) appear in the same chapter section but were not assigned RSCD series IDs in this wave (they are static tables, not figures). Flag for Phase 4/5 follow-up if table-only series IDs are introduced later.
